column1: # Cross-Jurisdiction Comparison of Major Cybersecurity Disclosure Frameworks

column3: Essential and important entities (18 sectors, 50+ employees or EUR 10M turnover)
column5: All organisations processing personal data of EU residents
No (but DPIAs required for high-risk processing)

column3: Management body must approve measures; personal liability possible

column5: No specific board disclosure requirement (but accountability principle applies)

column3: Up to EUR 10M or 2% of global turnover

column5: Up to EUR 20M or 4% of global turnover

column4: Required (oversight framework for all ICT third-party providers; ESA oversight of critical providers)
